section.title: Product cost
section.subtitle: Choose how the margin is calculated for this product.
section.no_components_hint: Add at least one component to see the margin.
section.preview_no_price: Set a sale price to see the margin

method.label: Calculation method
method.fixed_help: Cost stays constant, uses the declared value
method.latest_help: Reacts immediately to every new purchase

component.label: Label

type.manual_help: A fixed number you declare (services, packaging, overhead)
type.category_quantity_help: Computed from how much you consume of an item recorded in Purchases
type.category_share_help: A percentage of the total spent on a purchased item
type.org_average_help: Estimate from your organisation's average purchases

component.category_placeholder: Search or type the item name…
component.category_help: Matches the "Item" field you used in Purchases (e.g. apples, tomatoes)
component.category_no_options: No items available. Record some purchases first.
component.category_avg_price_multi_unit: Average price: {{price}} per {{unit}} (most-used; this item was also purchased in {{others}})
component.category_not_in_purchases: This item is not yet in Purchases. It will be linked once you record the first purchase.
component.qty_per_unit_help: How much of this item you consume to produce 1 unit of your finished product
component.qty_unit_auto: Unit of measure ({{unit}}) taken automatically from Purchases
component.share_pct_auto_hint: Leave empty to split proportionally to revenue

failed_reason.no_purchases_in_window: No purchases in the selected period
failed_reason.no_sales_in_window: No sales in the selected period

confidence.declared_help: Based on the values you entered manually
confidence.mixed_help: Combination of actual data and declared values
confidence.estimated_org_average_help: Approximation from organisation averages. Configure a manual cost or purchase categories for greater precision.
confidence.unknown_help: Configure at least one cost component to see the margin

empty.title: Cost not configured
empty.description: Add cost components to see this product's margin.

wizard.title: Quick setup
wizard.subtitle: We'll configure cost calculation for your business type.
wizard.intro: Pick the type of business you run and we'll apply suitable defaults to all your products. You can fine-tune each individual product later.

business.manual_desc: I prefer to configure each product manually

history.title: Unit cost history
history.subtitle: How cost has evolved over time

reconciliation.title: Cashflow consistency
reconciliation.needs_attention: Many costs unattributed — link more purchases to products for better precision
